attacking_style: Opportunistic breakaway rider who targets intermediate sprints and stage placements rather than outright wins. Shows willingness to contest final sprints from breaks for podium positions.
team_tactics: Used as an aggressive domestique in Grand Tours - sent into breakaways to gather time splits, control break dynamics, and collect bonus seconds when opportunities arise without threatening GC.
terrain_preference: Breakaway-friendly transitional stages where early moves can succeed. Capable of finishing efforts with sprint contested placements rather than requiring selective climbing terrain.
vulnerability: Not a stage winner profile - limited ability to convert breakaway presence into victories. Finishes second or third in reduced sprints rather than dominating.
key_patterns: Multiple breakaway appearances within same Grand Tour, showing repeated deployment pattern (2 observations)
Targets bonus seconds and time splits rather than stage wins (2 observations)
Team consistently uses him for early reconnaissance and information gathering (2 observations)
Finishes second or third in break sprints, not first (2 observations)
form_trajectory: neutral: Consistent role execution across 2018-2020 as breakaway domestique without evolution toward stage-winning capability
